prompt: Generate an image illustrating object detection visuals. Show bounding boxes and labels highlighting objects similar to the swan from image 1, presented on a screen or interface style reminiscent of the laptop view in image 2. Focus on clear graphical overlays.
prompt_refined: Generate an image displaying an object detection interface. The primary visual should be a screen, presented with an angle and style reminiscent of the laptop in image 2. On this screen, show a natural scene where multiple white swans, similar in appearance to the swan in image 1, are clearly identified. Each swan must have a distinct bounding box overlaid, accompanied by a legible label such as 'SWAN' or 'Cygnus'. Ensure these graphical detection overlays are sharp, well-defined, and prominently displayed.
objects: Multiple white swans (on screen, similar to image 1)
